name: tina4_code
description: Generate idiomatic Tina4 framework code (tina4-python, tina4-php, tina4js, Tina4CSS, Swagger, MCP, queues, ORM, auth). Set `language` (python/php/js/nodejs/ruby) to force the target — the prompt classifier mis-detects on ambiguous text, so pass it whenever you know the language. Pass image_url (a UI screenshot data: URI or URL) to turn a mockup into Tina4 code.
